source.authority: Official Gazette of the Republic of Slovenia
source.scope: Official-gazette-backed Slovenia calendar-year 2026 annual income-tax scale on caller-confirmed net annual tax base.

SI.notes: Annual income tax under the official 16%, 26%, 33%, 39% and 50% scale on caller-confirmed net annual tax base. Allowances, social contributions and advance-payment reconciliation remain outside scope.
